name: signature_pad
when_to_use: 需要在对话工件里采集平滑手写签名并保留可重放笔迹时用它而非手写 Canvas,因为原生在压感点采样、变宽贝塞尔平滑与高 DPI 坐标一致性上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写固定线宽 pointermove 涂鸦,做不到稳定的速度滤波、笔画分组、压感点往返和高 DPI 清晰度;signature_pad 原生以 PointGroup[] 闭环输入与输出。

data_in.note: strokes 精确对应 signaturePad.toData()/fromData() 的 PointGroup[];点坐标以 Canvas 的 CSS 像素坐标系记录,恢复时应保持相同画布尺寸。

options?._default: 省略时使用上游默认值

spec.note: Canvas 必须显式使用像素高度;boot 默认 240px并按 devicePixelRatio 扩大 backing store,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。改变宽高会清空 Canvas,须先保存 toData() 再重绘。

example._why: PointGroup 要求每组同时带绘制参数与 BasicPoint[],属于高歧义几何输入;minimal 钉死 fromData 的精确层级。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;消费 AI 可把 pad.toData() 的 PointGroup[] 或 pad.toDataURL() 结果下载导出。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行在明确的确认控件中读取 pad.toData(),再拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不绑定统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取 pad.toData() 并调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: supported:零依赖 Canvas/Pointer Events,挂载与全部状态都留在 shadowRoot;无 head、worker、wasm 足迹
carriers.codex: supported:单 ESM + Canvas2D;导出 PNG/JPEG/SVG 均由浏览器本地完成

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr signature_pad@5.1.3: `S as default` export matches `import SignaturePad from`. dist/types/signature_pad.d.ts: `constructor(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement, options?: Options)`, `fromData(pointGroups: PointGroup[])`, `toData(): PointGroup[]`. Schema fields are exact: PointGroupOptions{dotSize,minWidth,maxWidth,penColor,velocityFilterWeight,compositeOperation}, PointGroup extends it with points: BasicPoint[], BasicPoint{x,y,pressure,time} (point.d.ts) — all match schema.PointGroup + points. options keys (minWidth/maxWidth/penColor/backgroundColor/velocityFilterWeight/throttle/minDistance) all exist on Options. Isolation: +esm shows 0 across document.head/body/createElement('style')/document.addEventListener/window.addEventListener — pointer events are attached to the canvas element only; all state stays in the shadow-mounted canvas. Textbook shadow-safe.

en.when_to_use: Use it to capture a smooth handwritten signature in a conversational artifact while preserving replayable strokes instead of handwritten Canvas code, which fails at pressure-point sampling, variable-width Bezier smoothing, and consistent high-DPI coordinates.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only create fixed-width pointermove drawing and cannot provide stable velocity filtering, stroke grouping, pressure-point round-tripping, and high-DPI clarity; signature_pad natively closes input and output as PointGroup[].

data_in.note: strokes maps exactly to the PointGroup[] returned and accepted by signaturePad.toData()/fromData(); point coordinates use the Canvas CSS-pixel coordinate system, so restore them at the same canvas size.

schema.strokes?: PointGroup[] -- Default []; represents an empty signature

spec.note: Canvas must use an explicit pixel height; boot defaults to 240px and scales the backing store by devicePixelRatio. vh and percentage heights are forbidden by rule 3. Changing width or height clears Canvas, so save toData() before resizing and redraw afterward.
